positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene featuring silhouetted pine trees and glowing ethereal mist at dawn. The composition is highly symmetrical, with the trees arranged in an arching, repeating pattern. The overall color palette is deep indigo, vibrant teal, and accents of soft gold and luminous pearl white, emphasizing strong contrast. Design should look fantastic on fabric, featuring clean lines and negative space. Highly detailed, vector illustration quality, perfect for apparel print, centered composition, high saturation.
